headline: Why the First 5 Years of Retirement Are the Most Dangerous for Your Portfolio
summary: Let’s say you have two retirees with the same $1 million portfolio and they each withdraw the same amount each year, and both also earn the same average return over the next 30 years. The thing is, one of them is going to run out of money by 25, while the other finishes with more ... Why the First 5 Years of Retirement Are the Most Dangerous for Your Portfolio

headline: Retirees, Don’t Do Anything Rash With Your Portfolios
summary: A weak jobs report and the war in Iran sent stocks sliding  Friday, a queasy-making move for retirees living off their portfolios.  The economy shed 92,000 jobs last month, the Bureau of Labor Statistics said Friday, coming much weaker than analysts’ expectation of a 60,000 gain.  The  slid about 1.2% and the  fell 1.1% on Friday Meanwhile, oil soared past $90 a barrel on tensions in the Middle East and the effective shutdown of the Strait of Hormuz, a major shipping route.

headline: Will Raymond James' Expansion Strategy Fuel Revenue Growth?
summary: RJF ramps up acquisitions, from Clark Capital to GreensLedge, to expand asset management, boost AUM and drive recurring fee-based revenue growth.

headline: Deutsche Bank favours exchanges amid market volatility, upgrades Intercontinental
summary: Investing.com -- Intercontinental Exchange was upgraded to Buy from Hold by Deutsche Bank, which said exchanges appear best positioned among financial market firms as volatility lifts trading activity.

headline: Robinhood Fell 40% in 3 Months—Warning Sign or Buy-the-Dip Setup?
summary: Robinhood stock has rebounded after a sharp three-month decline. Analysts still see more than 50% upside, suggesting the pullback may be a buying opportunity.

headline: Charles Schwab Acquisition Of Forge Opens New Path To Private Markets
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) has completed its acquisition of Forge Global Holdings. The deal brings Forge’s private market platform into Schwab’s ecosystem. Schwab plans to offer broader access to pre-IPO and other private company shares for its retail clients and advisors. For you as an investor, this move means one of the largest US retail brokerage platforms is now building a bridge to private markets that were historically limited to institutions and ultra high net worth clients. Charles...
